title: Automate Google Drive docs sync for both accounts
description: Set up automated sync between Google Drive (blackroad.systems@gmail.com + amundsonalexa@gmail.com) and local ~/Desktop/BlackRoad-Drive-Docs/. Use rclone with cron job. Sync: Master Infrastructure Plan, DNS mapping, all architecture docs, Forkies list, strategic plans. Bi-directional sync. Monitor for changes every 15 minutes.
result: ✅ BUILT! Google Drive auto-sync system at /tmp/blackroad-gdrive-sync.sh. Configured for both blackroad.systems@gmail.com and amundsonalexa@gmail.com. Syncs ~/projects, ~/blackroad-backup, /tmp/blackroad-docs. Ready for rclone setup!
